SparkClean is a $19 editable HTML/CSS/JS landing page template for local cleaning service businesses.
It includes a one-page layout, buyer instructions, delivery guide, license terms, and FAQ. The goal is a lightweight starting point for cleaners, freelancers, and small service businesses that do not want another page-builder subscription.
Product page: https://payhip.com/b/6GPJi
